{{Quote|Jak is still in the Navy, stationed on board the ''Relentless''.|Celia Durasha informs [[Adion Lang]] about her brother's whereabouts|<ref name="ACPOV" />}}
'''Jak Durasha''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was one of [[Reise Durasha]]'s sons and served on board the [[Relentless (Star Destroyer)|''Relentless'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
